name: Roy Cooper
subject: re: back to school
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Our teachers deserve fair pay and respect. Add your name if you agree.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203268/2fde7c66/45a519a4/156950d3/2253303478/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/tell-nc-legislators-stop-underpaying-our-teachers?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em17_170826_teachers_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em17_170826_teachers_adv_gq_ful__rc")
---
Friend,

Across North Carolina, children are returning to their classrooms to begin another school year.

It's an exciting time, but what students may not see is the hard work and preparation that goes into a new year.

Many teachers have to reach into their own pockets to pay for school supplies. Many worked second jobs over the summer to help pay the bills, and they spend weeks organizing their classrooms and coming up with lesson plans.

Unfortunately, Republican legislative leaders passed a budget this year that prioritized corporate tax giveaways over a real teacher pay raise plan.

**[Our teachers deserve better. Join me in telling Republican legislators to stop underpaying our kids' teachers and fully fund our schools.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203268/2fde7c66/45a519a4/156950d2/2253303478/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/tell-nc-legislators-stop-underpaying-our-teachers?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2+-+Our+teachers+deserve+better+Join+me+in+t&utm_campaign=em17_170826_teachers_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em17_170826_teachers_adv_gq_ful__rc")**

My proposed budget included a raise for every teacher in our state, and it put North Carolina on a path toward the national average in teacher pay.

And while Legislative Republicans claimed to agree with these priorities, their plan invests $340 million less in teacher pay over the next two years than my proposal.

That's just wrong.

**[Our teachers deserve fair pay and respect from our legislative leaders in Raleigh. Add your name if you agree.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203268/2fde7c66/45a519a4/156950d5/2253303478/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/tell-nc-legislators-stop-underpaying-our-teachers?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=3+-+Our+teachers+deserve+fair+pay+and+respec&utm_campaign=em17_170826_teachers_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em17_170826_teachers_adv_gq_ful__rc")**

Thanks for all you do,

Roy | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203268/2fde7c66/45a519a4/156950d4/2253303478/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/tell-nc-legislators-stop-underpaying-our-teachers?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+rarr&utm_campaign=em17_170826_teachers_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em17_170826_teachers_adv_gq_ful__rc")
---

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203268/2fde7c66/45a519a4/156950d7/2253303478/VEsD/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=5+-+httpactroycoopercomunsubscribe&utm_campaign=em17_170826_teachers_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em17_170826_teachers_adv_gq_ful__rc")

Many worked second jobs over the summer to help pay the bills, and they spend weeks organizing their classrooms and coming up with lesson plans. Unfortunately, Republican legislative leaders passed a budget this year that prioritized corporate tax giveaways over a real teacher pay raise plan. "" My proposed budget included a raise for every teacher in our state, and it put North Carolina on a path toward the national average in teacher pay. name: Democrats.org
subject: Raise your voice, Derek
body:
Your voice can change the world. **We need 75 Democrats from Manassas to step up before Thursday if we're going to hit our August fundraising goal. Can you chip in $3 or more today?

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237f1/4067b0a/3d90c3862/7e6e3754/1592411980/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170826_dnc2_nd")**

[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237f1/4067b0a/3d90c3862/7e6e3755/1592411980/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170826_dnc2_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237f1/4067b0a/3d90c3862/7e6e3752/1592411980/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170826_dnc2_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237f1/4067b0a/3d90c3862/7e6e3753/1592411980/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170826_dnc2_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237f1/4067b0a/3d90c3862/7e6e3750/1592411980/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170826_dnc2_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237f1/4067b0a/3d90c3862/7e6e3751/1592411980/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170826_dnc2_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237f1/4067b0a/3d90c3862/7e6e375e/1592411980/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170826_dnc2_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237f1/4067b0a/3d90c3862/7e6e375f/1592411980/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170826_dnc2_nd")

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237f1/4067b0a/3d90c3862/7e6e3766/1592411980/VEsHAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170826_dnc2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237f1/4067b0a/3d90c3862/7e6e3767/1592411980/VEsHAw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170826_dnc2_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237f1/4067b0a/3d90c3862/7e6e3764/1592411980/VEsHAg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170826_dnc2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237f1/4067b0a/3d90c3862/7e6e3765/1592411980/VEsHDQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170826_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170826_dnc2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: Team Maggie
subject: Ending Citizens United
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde35/2a380d31/1f53439d/fe7fe1/1311148537/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde35/2a380d31/1f53439d/fe7fe1/1311148537/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
During her campaign, Senator Hassan pledged to Granite Staters and people across the country that she would take action to help ensure that money does not control our elections.
Now that she's in the Senate, that's exactly what she is doing.
Senator Hassan recently joined 45 of her colleagues in introducing the DISCLOSE Act of 2017, a bill that requires any organization that participates in political spending to disclose its major donors -- restoring accountability and making sure that voters know who is behind political advertising.
In short, this is a major step toward counteracting the devastating _Citizens United_ decision and ensuring that money does not control our politics.
Congressional Republicans are sure to stonewall this common-sense bill, so it's incumbent on all of us to keep the pressure on. **That's why we're opening up our own End _Citizens United_ Fund, and we need to put $5,000 in it by tomorrow at midnight. [We can only get there with your help, so please give $3 or more now to join the fight for campaign finance reform and demand transparency in our elections.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde35/2a380d31/1f53439d/fe7fe2/1311148537/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDgyNl9FQ1UxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170826_ECU1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde35/2a380d31/1f53439d/fe7fe3/1311148537/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDgyNl9FQ1UxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170826_ECU1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde35/2a380d31/1f53439d/fe7fec/1311148537/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDgyNl9FQ1UxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170826_ECU1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde35/2a380d31/1f53439d/fe7fed/1311148537/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDgyNl9FQ1UxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170826_ECU1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde35/2a380d31/1f53439d/fe7fe2/1311148537/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDgyNl9FQ1UxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170826_ECU1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Senator Hassan is working to eliminate the loopholes that allow foreign donors, corporations, or governments to influence our elections, but she's not stopping there.
She helped introduce the Fair Elections Now Act, which would cut back on the influence big donors and corporate special interests have on our elections by creating a voluntary system of public financing for Senate candidates.
But these bills won't move forward unless we all step up and take action:
[**If you're committed to undoing the impact of _Citizens United_ and reclaiming power from corporate special interests and giving it back to voters, please give $3 or as much as you can to our End _Citizens United_ Fund to be part of the grassroots team leading this fight.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde35/2a380d31/1f53439d/fe7fe2/1311148537/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDgyNl9FQ1UxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170826_ECU1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Thank you,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde35/2a380d31/1f53439d/fe7fe2/1311148537/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDgyNl9FQ1UxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170826_ECU1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde35/2a380d31/1f53439d/fe7fee/1311148537/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: TIMELY@dscc.org
subject: How we are celebrating Women's Equality Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Celebrate Women's Equality Day by showing your support for the Women's Senate Network.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-womens-senate-network?refcode=DPE-20170826-Timely_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team,

Women's Equality Day is an opportunity not only to reflect on the progress we've made, but to gear up for the fights we have ahead -- and under this administration, we know there are many yet to come. We have to keep working if we want to achieve full equality on critical issues like equal pay, reproductive freedom, and paid family leave.

The bottom line is that if we lose the 10 Democratic women senators who are up for re-election in 2018, we won't be able to make progress on any of these issues. Or, worse, we could lose the gains we've made.

That's why we need every single one of these women in the Senate fighting for equality and pushing for progress.

[**Pitch in $1 or more today to help us build the Women 's Senate Network. Together we'll ensure each one of our women Senators up for re-election has the resources they need to win in 2018.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-womens-senate-network?refcode=DPE-20170826-Timely_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

The Democratic women in the Senate up for re-election next year represent nearly HALF of the women in the Senate -- an unprecedented situation. It's also at a time when the Senate also has more women, and women of color serving than any other time in its history. That's why 2018 is so critical.

We need them to keep breaking barriers and persisting, but they can't do it without your help.

**So on this Women 's Equality Day, stand with us and chip in $1 or more to make sure that our 10 democratic women senators have the resources they need to run robust campaigns for re-election to the Senate.**

[**http://www.dscc.org/celebrate-womens-equality-day**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-womens-senate-network?refcode=DPE-20170826-Timely_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for your support,

Team DSCC

**[P.S. And if you pitch in $35 or more on Women's Equality Day to the Women's Senate Network, we'll send you our limited edition "Nevertheless, She Persisted" tote bag (Shipping included!)>>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wed-wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20170826-Timely_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d9f8/2b07114c/1e8986e/7313e1d8/1794958106/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d9f8/2b07114c/1e8986e/7313e1db/1794958106/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d9f8/2b07114c/1e8986e/7313e1da/1794958106/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: ⚠️ We’re being outraised, Derek
body:
Step up before our deadline on Thursday. **We need 72 Democrats from your community to step up before Thursday if we're going to hit our August fundraising goal. Can you chip in $10 or more today?

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=72&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&source=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&refcode=em_20170826_dnc3_rem")**

[](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=72&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&source=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&refcode=em_20170826_dnc3_rem") [](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=72&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&source=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&refcode=em_20170826_dnc3_rem") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=72&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&source=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&refcode=em_20170826_dnc3_rem")
**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=72&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&source=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&refcode=em_20170826_dnc3_rem")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=72&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&source=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&refcode=em_20170826_dnc3_rem")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=72&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&source=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&refcode=em_20170826_dnc3_rem")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=72&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&source=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&refcode=em_20170826_dnc3_rem")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=72&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=19+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&source=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&refcode=em_20170826_dnc3_rem")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=72&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=20+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&source=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&refcode=em_20170826_dnc3_rem")
**

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523608/4067b0a/3d8dbff7f/7e6e3bb8/218273431/VEsEBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=21+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&source=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&refcode=em_20170826_dnc3_rem"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523608/4067b0a/3d8dbff7f/7e6e3bb9/218273431/VEsEBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=22+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&source=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&refcode=em_20170826_dnc3_rem"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523608/4067b0a/3d8dbff7f/7e6e3b46/218273431/VEsEBg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=23+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&source=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&refcode=em_20170826_dnc3_rem") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523608/4067b0a/3d8dbff7f/7e6e3b47/218273431/VEsEAQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=24+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&source=em_20170826_dnc3_rem&refcode=em_20170826_dnc3_rem"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|
